prompt: Create a cinematic fashion editorial triptych on a wide horizontal canvas, divided into exactly 3 equal vertical panels with thin white separator lines. Use a moody concrete studio setting with dark gray textured walls and floor, soft overhead industrial lighting, subtle film grain, muted contrast, and high-fashion magazine photography styling. The same tall slim female model appears in all three panels, with her face deliberately obscured by a soft rectangular blur/censor block for an anonymous editorial look. Panel 1: full-body standing pose, the model wears a vivid electric blue tailored pantsuit with a blazer, slim ankle-length trousers, and matching pointed high heels; she stands confidently with hands near the blazer buttons, two rectangular ceiling lights visible above, gray concrete wall behind her. Panel 2: seated side-profile pose, the model wears a black tailored suit, sitting on the floor beside a minimal metal chair, knees bent, head tilted back, one hand raised near her mouth in a contemplative gesture; lighting is darker and more dramatic with deep shadows. Panel 3: dynamic motion pose, the model wears a flowing deep red long-sleeve dress with a wide swirling skirt; her hair whips sideways as if spinning, the skirt billows dramatically across the lower frame with sheer fabric layers, against the same gray studio wall. Keep the composition realistic and photographic, with exactly 3 visible outfits: 1 electric blue pantsuit, 1 black suit, and 1 deep red flowing dress. Maintain elegant editorial posing, subdued background, no logos, no readable text, no extra people, and no additional panels.
